title: Sanding Block 6 Pieces Hard Sanding Sponges, 80/100/120/180/320/400 Grits Wet Dry Reusable Sanding Pads for Wood, Plastic, Drywall and Metal Polis
features: Product Size: Our 10*7*2.5cm sanding blocks comes in a box of 12. Sufficient quantity for any job. Multiple grits available, from coarse for rapid stock removal to fine for a flawless finish. (Note: The smaller number is the coarser grit and the larger number is the finer grit) Ideal for pros and DIYers, it's the key to effortless, efficient sanding.

High Quality Material:Our sanding sponge combines high-density sponge with fine alumina sandpaper.The sandpaper block suits uneven surfaces, great for wood & metal work. The sanding blocks for walls is abrasion-resistant, with calibrated grit for various tasks.Ideal for DIYers, carpenters & metalworkers to get pro results easily.

Wet and Dry Avallable: Dry sanding? High-density sanding blocks for wood teams with fine sandpaper to smooth wood, plastic, metal. Ideal for edge, paint work.Wet use? Absorbent abrasive pads spreads water, stops overheating & scratching. Perfect for polishing furniture, cars.DIY or pro, it offers convenience, durability. Grab it!

Wide Application: Our foam sanding pads is a true multitasker. In automotive care, it banishes scratches on bodywork. For woodcrafters, it sculpts and smoothes. Metalworkers rely on it for rust and polish. In electronics, it deburrs circuit boards. At home, it rejuvenates countertops and furniture. From factories to DIYers' toolboxes, this sponge sanding pads conquers every surface, making it an essential ally in any project.

Reliable After-Sales Assurance: Choose our sanding pad and gain more than a product. Our after-sales service is top-notch. If quality or performance falters, our team responds within 24 hours. Hassle-free replacements or refunds available. We offer usage tips too. Novice or expert, rely on us for worry-free projects.
